zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Belgrave於1440年1月1日出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾貝爾格拉福時，他的父親Sir William de Belgrave21歲，母親Marjory de Willoughby20歲。他於1459年1月1日與Catherine Glynn在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1530年1月1日在他的家鄉享年90歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Belgrave于1440年1月1日出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾貝爾格拉福时，他的父亲Sir William de Belgrave21岁，母亲Marjory de Willoughby20岁。他于1459年1月1日与Catherine Glynn在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1530年1月1日在他的家乡享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: Belgrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Leicestershire, recorded in Domesday Book as Merdegrave. The original name derived from Old English mearth ‘marten’ + grāf ‘grove’, but after the Norman Conquest the first element was taken to be Old French merde ‘dung, filth’, and changed to Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’, to remove the unpleasant association. A mid 12th-century writer refers to the place as ‘Merthegrave, nunc (now) Belegrava’.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Belgrave was born on 1 January 1440, in Belgrave, Leicestershire, England, his father, Sir William de Belgrave, was 21 and his mother, Marjory de Willoughby, was 20. He married Catherine Glynn on 1 January 1459, in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 1 January 1530, in his hometown, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Belgrave est né le 1 janvier 1440, à Belgrave, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Belgrave, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Marjory de Willoughby, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Glynn le 1 janvier 1459, à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 1 janvier 1530, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Belgrave am 1. Januar 1440 in Belgrave, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Belgrave 21 und seine Mutter Marjory de Willoughby 20. Er hat am 1. Januar 1459 in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Catherine Glynn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 1. Januar 1530 im Alter von 90 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Belgrave è nato il il 1 gennaio 1440 nel Belgrave, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir William de Belgrave, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Marjory de Willoughby, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Glynn il 1 gennaio 1459, nel Leicester, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 1 gennaio 1530, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 90 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Belgraveが1440年1月1日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルグラブで生まれた時，父Sir William de Belgraveは21歳，母Marjory de Willoughbyは20歳であった。1459年1月1日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターでCatherine Glynnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1530年1月1日に故郷で90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Belgrave(이)가 1440년 1월 1일 영국 레이스스터실르 벨그레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Belgrave(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Marjory de Willoughby(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1459년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에서 Catherine Glynn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1530년 1월 1일 그의 고향에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Belgrave родился 1 января 1440 г. в местности белграв, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William de Belgrave было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Marjory de Willoughby, 20.
